2.3.1 时停中 被撫摸耳朵 口上文
2.1.2 指令失败拒绝 被撫摸耳朵 有允许 口上文
2.2.3 指令失败拒绝 被撫摸耳朵 无允许 善意 口上文

zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Begin_Allow_1: $self$顺势将脸颊贴向$target$的手掌，鼻尖溢出一声舒适的轻哼。"嗯……那里弄得人家好痒。"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Begin_Allow_2: $self$手上的动作没停，只微微偏过头去，温顺地任凭$target$的手指揉捏着她柔软的耳垂。
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Begin_Allow_3: $self$缩着脖子笑着躲闪了一下，紧接着又主动把脸凑了回来。"别闹啦……好嘛，就让你摸一会儿。"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Begin_Allow_4: $self$缓缓阖上双眼，脸庞浮现出毫无防备的松弛感，温顺得像只正在被顺毛的猫咪。
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Begin_NoAllow_Like_1: $self$像是被施了定身法般僵在原地，连躲避都忘记了，只睁大眼睛愣愣地看着。"诶？那个……这是在做什么？"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Begin_NoAllow_Like_2: $self$的肩膀猛地一缩，带着难以置信的神情望向$target$。"请、请等一下……！"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Begin_NoAllow_Like_3: $self$慌慌张张地想要后退，却因为这突如其来的亲昵举动而大脑一片空白，没能立刻做出反应。
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Begin_NoAllow_Hate_1: $self$死死咬住下唇，身体因恐惧而抑制不住地细微颤抖，却不敢对$target$的动作表现出任何反抗。
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Begin_NoAllow_Hate_2: $self$盯着地面，眼眶微微泛红，强忍着喉咙里想要尖叫的冲动，任由那只手触碰自己。
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Begin_NoAllow_Hate_3: $self$虽然满脸都写着厌恶，但在$target$冰冷的注视下，只能像个木偶般僵硬地垂下双手。"……如果您非要这样侮辱我的话。"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Sleep_1: $self$在睡梦中不满地蹙起眉，下意识想把干扰源拨开，手却迷迷糊糊地握住了$target$作乱的手指。
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Sleep_2: $self$含糊不清地嘟囔了一句梦话，翻身将脸深深埋进枕头里，试图逃避那扰人清梦的触感。
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Sleep_3: $self$原本平稳的呼吸乱了一拍，长长的睫毛轻颤着，似乎因为耳朵上传来的异样酥麻感而即将转醒。
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_TimeStop_1: $self$依旧保持着静止不动的姿态，唯有那被反复揉捏的耳垂因充血而逐渐变得艳红，那是肉体最诚实的生理反应。
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_TimeStop_2: $self$毫无知觉地凝固在时空中，只有柔软的耳朵随着$target$手指的动作发生着各种形状的改变。
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_TimeStop_3: $self$僵直的躯体无法给予任何回应，但受刺激的耳道内壁深处，已开始悄然分泌出湿润的体液。
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Fail_Allow_1: $self$轻轻拍掉了$target$的手，带着几分娇嗔瞪了一眼。"好痒呀，快放手啦。"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Fail_Allow_2: $self$捂着耳朵夸张地跳到一旁，脸上带着开玩笑般的嫌弃表情。"噫！你的手好冰！绝对不要！"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Fail_Allow_3: $self$侧头避开了$target$的触碰，有些无奈地叹了口气。"我现在正忙着呢，可没空陪你玩这个。"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Fail_NoAllow_Like_1: $self$礼貌却坚定地挡开了$target$的手，脸上挂着一丝尴尬而不失礼貌的微笑。"那个……我不太习惯这样的接触，抱歉。"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Fail_NoAllow_Like_2: $self$不动声色地拉开了一点距离，借着整理头发的动作掩住了耳朵。"如果是玩笑的话，稍微有点过火了哦。"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Fail_NoAllow_Like_3: $self$退后半步，用充满疑惑的目光审视着$target$。"我想我们要讨论的话题，应该和我的耳朵没关系吧？"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Fail_NoAllow_Hate_1: $self$猛地挥手打开了$target$伸过来的手臂，眼中的温度瞬间降到了冰点。"别碰我！"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Fail_NoAllow_Hate_2: $self$像是在看什么脏东西一样看着$target$，声音里透着冰冷的警告。"你这是性骚扰，请自重。"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Fail_NoAllow_Hate_3: $self$立刻退到了安全距离之外，一脸警惕地护住耳朵。"如果你再敢靠近，我有权报警处理。"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Succ_Allow_1: $self$的呼吸渐渐变得有些急促，脸颊染上了淡淡的红晕。"嗯……$target$的手法……意外地让人有点不想停下来了……"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Succ_Allow_2: $self$彻底放下了手中的活计，身子软软地依偎进$target$怀里。"再多摸一会儿……那边也要……"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Succ_Allow_3: $self$反手扣住$target$的手腕，不让那只手离开。"怎么停了？继续嘛……"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Succ_NoAllow_1: $self$原本抗拒推拒的手逐渐无力垂下，眼里的警惕慢慢消散，取而代之的是一种迷茫的水雾。"这是……什么感觉……"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Succ_NoAllow_2: $self$的喘息声愈发沉重，虽然还在试图推开，手上的力气却越来越小。"不……不行……这种事……"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Succ_NoAllow_3: $self$难耐地咬着手指，眼神开始变得涣散失焦，身体违背了意志，不由自主地迎合着$target$的动作。
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Bad_Allow_1: $self$有些不耐烦地推开了$target$的手，揉了揉被捏得发红的耳廓。"够了吧？有点痛了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Bad_Allow_2: $self$皱起眉头，身体僵硬地往后缩了缩。"这种感觉怪怪的……我不喜欢，停下吧。"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Bad_Allow_3: $self$叹了口气，把$target$的手拿下来扔在一边。"玩够了吗？我的耳朵都要被你捏肿了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Bad_NoAllow_1: $self$忍无可忍地爆发了，用力推开$target$转身就跑。"变态！离我远点！"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Bad_NoAllow_2: $self$的眼泪终于夺眶而出，用袖子拼命擦拭着耳朵上残留的触感。"恶心……太恶心了……"
zh-cn.com_touch_ears_Bad_NoAllow_3: $self$浑身颤抖地缩在角落里，看向$target$的眼神里充满了深深的恐惧和憎恨。

en-us.com_touch_ears_Begin_Allow_1: $self$ naturally leans her cheek into $target$'s palm, letting out a comfortable hum. "Mmm... that tickles."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Begin_Allow_2: $self$ doesn't stop what she's doing, only tilting her head slightly, docilely letting $target$'s fingers play with her earlobe.
en-us.com_touch_ears_Begin_Allow_3: $self$ shrinks her neck and dodges with a laugh, then actively leans back in. "Stop it... alright, fine, I'll let you touch for a bit."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Begin_Allow_4: $self$ closes her eyes, her face relaxing completely, looking like a cat being groomed.
en-us.com_touch_ears_Begin_NoAllow_Like_1: $self$ freezes in place, forgetting to even dodge, eyes wide with confusion. "Eh? Um... what are you doing?"
en-us.com_touch_ears_Begin_NoAllow_Like_2: $self$'s shoulders jerk up suddenly, looking at $target$ in disbelief. "P-please wait...!"
en-us.com_touch_ears_Begin_NoAllow_Like_3: $self$ panics and tries to back away, but is too shocked by the sudden intimacy to react immediately.
en-us.com_touch_ears_Begin_NoAllow_Hate_1: $self$ bites her lower lip hard, her body trembling slightly with fear, yet she dares not resist $target$'s actions.
en-us.com_touch_ears_Begin_NoAllow_Hate_2: $self$ stares at the ground, eyes reddening, suppressing the urge to scream as she endures the touch.
en-us.com_touch_ears_Begin_NoAllow_Hate_3: $self$, though looking utterly disgusted, can only stiffly lower her hands under $target$'s cold gaze. "...If you insist on humiliating me like this."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Sleep_1: $self$ frowns in her sleep, subconsciously trying to brush away the annoyance, but ends up grabbing $target$'s fingers instead.
en-us.com_touch_ears_Sleep_2: $self$ mutters something incoherent and buries her face deep into the pillow, trying to escape the disturbance.
en-us.com_touch_ears_Sleep_3: $self$'s breathing rhythm falters, her long lashes trembling, seemingly about to wake up from the strange sensation on her ear.
en-us.com_touch_ears_TimeStop_1: $self$ remains motionless, but the fondled earlobe turns bright red from congestion, the body's honest physiological reaction.
en-us.com_touch_ears_TimeStop_2: $self$ remains frozen in time without perception, only her soft ear deforming under $target$'s fingers.
en-us.com_touch_ears_TimeStop_3: $self$'s stiff body cannot respond, but deep inside the stimulated ear canal, wet fluids quietly begin to secrete.
en-us.com_touch_ears_Fail_Allow_1: $self$ gently slaps $target$'s hand away, glaring with a hint of playfulness. "It tickles! Let go."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Fail_Allow_2: $self$ covers her ears and jumps aside, looking dramatically disgusted. "Eek! Your hands are cold! Absolutely not!"
en-us.com_touch_ears_Fail_Allow_3: $self$ turns her head to avoid $target$'s touch, sighing helplessly. "I'm busy right now, I don't have time to play with you."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Fail_NoAllow_Like_1: $self$ politely but firmly pushes $target$'s hand away, smiling awkwardly. "Um... I'm not really used to this kind of contact, sorry."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Fail_NoAllow_Like_2: $self$ calmly creates some distance, fixing her hair to cover her ear. "If this is a joke, it's a bit too much."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Fail_NoAllow_Like_3: $self$ takes a half-step back, scrutinizing $target$ with doubt. "I don't think what we need to discuss involves my ears, does it?"
en-us.com_touch_ears_Fail_NoAllow_Hate_1: $self$ violently swats $target$'s arm away, her eyes turning ice-cold instantly. "Don't touch me!"
en-us.com_touch_ears_Fail_NoAllow_Hate_2: $self$ looks at $target$ like he's trash, her voice filled with cold warning. "This is sexual harassment. behave yourself."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Fail_NoAllow_Hate_3: $self$ immediately retreats to a safe distance, guarding her ears vigilantly. "I have the right to call the police if you come any closer."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Succ_Allow_1: $self$'s breathing becomes slightly rapid, cheeks flushing a faint red. "Mmm... $target$'s touch... surprisingly makes me not want to stop..."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Succ_Allow_2: $self$ completely drops her work, leaning softly into $target$'s embrace. "Touch me a bit more... there too..."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Succ_Allow_3: $self$ grabs $target$'s wrist, refusing to let the hand leave. "Why did you stop? Keep going..."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Succ_NoAllow_1: $self$'s resisting hands gradually drop weakly, the vigilance in her eyes replaced by a misty confusion. "What is... this feeling..."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Succ_NoAllow_2: $self$'s panting becomes heavier, and though she tries to push away, her strength is fading. "No... I can't... this kind of thing..."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Succ_NoAllow_3: $self$ bites her finger, eyes losing focus, her body betraying her will and involuntarily welcoming $target$'s movements.
en-us.com_touch_ears_Bad_Allow_1: $self$ pushes $target$'s hand away impatiently, rubbing her reddened ear. "Enough, okay? It hurts a bit."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Bad_Allow_2: $self$ frowns, stiffening and shrinking back. "This feels weird... I don't like it, stop."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Bad_Allow_3: $self$ sighs, removing $target$'s hand and tossing it aside. "Done playing? My ear is going to swell up."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Bad_NoAllow_1: $self$ explodes with intolerance, pushing $target$ away and running. "Pervert! Stay away from me!"
en-us.com_touch_ears_Bad_NoAllow_2: $self$ finally bursts into tears, frantically wiping the lingering sensation from her ear with her sleeve. "Disgusting... so disgusting..."
en-us.com_touch_ears_Bad_NoAllow_3: $self$ trembles in the corner, looking at $target$ with deep fear and hatred.
